headline: Marketing jobs are among the most exposed to AI. Adobe and LinkedIn are teaming up to ensure the industry is upskilled—not replaced
summary: In a Fortune exclusive, Adobe and LinkedIn announce new coursework designed to teach marketing professionals how to properly use AI.

content.title: Marketing jobs are among the most exposed to AI. Adobe and LinkedIn are teaming up to ensure the industry is upskilled—not replaced
content.summary: In a Fortune exclusive, Adobe and LinkedIn announce new coursework designed to teach marketing professionals how to properly use AI.

thumbnail.caption: While the demand for AI-skilled talent is surging, most marketers still don’t have the skills to match it—and Adobe and LinkedIn are exclusively launching a new course.

headline: Salesforce’s Fin Deal Aims To Expand Agentforce AI And Investor Upside
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) agreed to acquire AI customer service platform Fin for US$3.6b. The deal is intended to fold Fin into Salesforce's Agentforce offering to expand autonomous digital labor capabilities. The acquisition targets broader use of AI agents across customer service and other enterprise workflows. Salesforce is a major enterprise software company best known for its customer relationship management platform and growing suite of cloud-based applications. The move for Fin comes as...

headline: AffordableHousing.com Expands Integrations with Industry-Leading Property Management Platforms
summary: AffordableHousing.com, the nation's largest affordable housing marketplace, is expanding its network of direct integrations with many of the industry's leading platforms, helping owners and operators market available units, connect with qualified renters, and fill vacancies faster through the systems they rely on every day.

headline: AutoRABIT Expands Salesforce DevSecOps Platform into MuleSoft API Governance with Integral Zone Acquisition
summary: AutoRABIT, a leading DevSecOps and security platform for Salesforce development teams, today announced the acquisition of Integral Zone, a MuleSoft-focused platform that helps organizations improve API security, accelerate enterprise and AI integrations, strengthen governance, and automate integration delivery.

content.summary: AutoRABIT, a leading DevSecOps and security platform for Salesforce development teams, today announced the acquisition of Integral Zone, a MuleSoft-focused platform that helps organizations improve API security, accelerate enterprise and AI integrations, strengthen governance, and automate integration delivery.
